title: Look for the Silver Lining
writer: Phoebe Ephron, Henry Ephron, Marian Spitzer
actors: June Haver, Ray Bolger, Gordon MacRae
plot: Marilyn Miller grows up in a showbiz family and hits Broadway before she is sixteen. She falls in love with her dancer-mentor Jack, but he is married. When she marries her stage partner Frank he soon is called to arms in World War I.
